name: Synco X-Talk X9 Wireless Intercom System with 9 Single-Ear Headsets
description: The Synco X-Talk X9 is a full-duplex wireless intercom system engineered to provide clear communication in a comfortable true-wireless design with no bodypack or hub required.

features.Key Features: Easy-to-Use Low-Power 2.4 GHz System | 9 Single-Ear Headsets, No Hub Needed | Full-Duplex, Use Any Headset as Master | True Wireless Headset, No Bodypack | Audio Echo Cancellation (AEC) | Divides into Two Groups | Comfortable Padded Ear Cushions | 1148' Operating Range | 24-Hour Battery Life, 3.5mm Monitor Jack | Rechargeable Batteries, Cables, and Bag
features.What’s In The Box: Synco X-Talk X9 Wireless Intercom System with 9 Single-Ear Headsets (2.4 GHz) | 9 x Headset | 9 x Rechargeable Battery | 9 x One-Ear Foam Cushion | 9 x Mic Windsreen | 5 x Charging Station | 5 x USB Cable | 9 x Carrying Bag | Storage Bag
